title: glochidion pulgarense
intro: Glochidion pulgarense, also known as the Philippine sandpaper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Glochidion pulgarense include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and treating various digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia.
